column5: letterboxd.com/bslaby/list/the-criterion-challenge-2021/ This serves as my watchlist for the above challenge. I will make a separate list ranking every one of the films when I get around to watching them. (film's corresponding challenge added in notes) UPDATE -- My mood changes a lot throughout time so this is absolutely not the original list I had (I wish I saved that somewhere just to see how much had changed), so you might see shifting every once in a while. I will be watching one film per weekend from the beginning of January through the end of December in 2021. I'll probably do some sort of social media thing for the entire challenge but I have no idea exactly what yet. Films that were formerly on the list but removed because they were taken off Criterion Channel - Bisbee '17 for week 33: a Western film (taken off February, replaced with I Shot Jesse James
